commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow regex and regression-test repair can address the remaining prompt-echo leak without a product or config decision.; Needs attention: No supply-chain changes were found, but the sanitizer still has a concrete prompt/source-text leakage edge before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Strip prompt tags after wrapped sentence endings — src/tts/tts-core.ts:83 (sha=930cee3b047918d9033bed52e58d9b56e3ff7c3c)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds TTS summary-output sanitization in `summarizeText` and expands `src/tts/tts-core.test.ts` coverage for prompt echoes, reasoning/control scaffolding, and preservation cases.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +98. Total +130 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main returns raw `summarizeText` output and the auto-TTS caller assigns that summary directly to `textForAudio`. I did not run live Microsoft/MiniMax audio playback.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow regex and regression-test repair can address the remaining prompt-echo leak without a product or config decision.

target.title: fix(tts): sanitize summarized speech text
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #90364.

TTS summarization now sanitizes summary-model output before returning text for speech:

- strips assistant/control scaffolding, echoed summary prompt instructions, narrow leading prompt preambles, exact echoed source blocks, and standalone or same-line echoed `<text_to_summarize>` prompt blocks
- preserves legitimate first-person summaries, user-summary prose, and inline prompt-tag mentions
- keeps cleanup in `summarizeText`, before auto-TTS assigns `summary.summary` to audio text

Final surface after trimming: 2 files, +186/-56.

## Root Cause

`src/tts/tts-core.ts` joined `TextContent` blocks from `completeSimple` and returned the raw string as `summary.summary`. Auto-TTS then used that value directly as `textForAudio`, so reasoning tags, control tokens, prompt echo, or echoed source text could be spoken.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Long-response TTS summaries no longer pass hidden reasoning/control scaffolding, echoed prompt text, exact echoed source prompt blocks, standalone or same-line prompt-block echoes, or control tokens through to the audio text candidate. Regression cases also cover preserving first-person `key points` prose, preserving inline `<text_to_summarize>` mentions, and stripping bare `The user asked me to summarize.` prompt echoes.

Real environment tested: Dedicated local macOS OpenClaw source checkout on branch `codex/fix-tts-summary-sanitization` at local commit `0c8f909bf9`, matching the touched-file content published at PR head `930cee3b`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm exec tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-tts-summary-proof.ts`

Evidence after fix:

```console
OpenClaw TTS summary proof
sanitizedSummary="Concise audible summary."
sanitizedOutputLength=24
targetLength=120
leakedForbiddenTokens=none
firstPersonSummary="I need to keep the key points from today's review. The release moves to Friday."
firstPersonPreserved=yes
inlineTagSummary="The docs mention `<text_to_summarize>` as a literal prompt marker. The release moves to Friday."
inlineTagPreserved=yes
joinedPromptSummary="Concise audible summary."
sameLinePromptSummary="Concise audible summary."
bareUserPromptSummary="Deployment was delayed until Friday."
audioText=Concise audible summary.
```

Observed result after fix: The production `summarizeText` cleanup path returned only `Concise audible summary.` for scaffolded summary-model output, preserved the first-person and inline-tag summaries, stripped joined and same-line prompt-block echoes, and stripped the bare user-summary prompt echo.

What was not tested: Live Microsoft/MiniMax audio playback was not run because provider credentials and audio playback setup were not available in this local checkout.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tts/tts-core.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/tts.contract.test.ts packages/speech-core/src/tts.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.sanitizeuserfacingtext.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-tts-summary-proof.ts`

Focused verification passed across 3 Vitest shards: 2 unit-fast files / 165 tests, 2 unit files / 44 tests, and 1 plugin-contract file / 41 tests.
target.author: monkeyleet
